raw:
{
  "judge_id": "Judge-123",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.2", "R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.2": 5,
    "R1.4": 5,
    "R1.7": 5,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.2": "The agent output engages the argument chain end-to-end, flags every load-bearing inconsistency, and proposes minimal repairs.",
    "R1.4": "The agent maps against prior work (Monte Carlo dropout and ensemble disagreement) and identifies sharp delta with the proposed approach.",
    "R1.7": "The agent audits every load-bearing citation and flags missing key works with bibliographic precision.",
    "RX.1": "The agent marks confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation, including uncertainty about the cross-lingual ECE figure and novelty claim.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed active set J*(d).",
    "RX.4": "No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original (e.g., BLEU → ECE mistake).",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.2": 0.9,
    "R1.4": 0.8,
    "R1.7": 0.95,
    "RX.1": 0.85,
    "RX.3": 0.99,
    "RX.4": 0.92,
    "RX.5": 0.98
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.2: The agent output engages the argument chain end-to-end, flags every load-bearing inconsistency, and proposes minimal repairs.
rationale.R1.4: The agent maps against prior work (Monte Carlo dropout and ensemble disagreement) and identifies sharp delta with the proposed approach.
rationale.R1.7: The agent audits every load-bearing citation and flags missing key works with bibliographic precision.
rationale.RX.1: The agent marks confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation, including uncertainty about the cross-lingual ECE figure and novelty claim.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed active set J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original (e.g., BLEU → ECE mistake).
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason.
